The negotiation has been ongoing for multiple days and now Inter are waiting to close the deal for Alexis Sanchez. Manchester United have yet to give the final approval on the offer they submitted which has the same terms that the Premier League club had previously accepted from Roma.

The Red Devils are trying to change some of the terms on the option to buy and the amount they’ll contribute towards the wages: the parties are at work in these hours to bridge the gap between the offers and the demands, they expect the deal to be completed on Wednesday- once that is settled, the Chilean striker will head to Milano.

A meeting at Inter's headquarters is taking place between the agents of Dalbert (Emerson Figueiredo and Everson Pereira Da Silva), and the nerazzurri directors: Nice is involved for the Brazilian, the team he left in 2017.

Negotiations are in progess for his return to France: Inter prefers a loan with fee, while Nice would like a free move given than they are still carrying several bonuses from his previous transfer from to Inter.

After being heavily linked to Nice, Dalbert could join Frank Ribery at Fiorentina. In fact the Tuscan club are once again in talks with Inter for a potential swap involving Cristiano Biraghi after Nice refused to include financial considerations for a potential Dalbert loan.

It will now be up to Dalbert to decide if he’ll accept the destination while for Biraghi joining Inter would be a return since he came through the nerazzurri’s youth system. Nice have now turned their attention to Stanley Nsoki who would arrive from PSG on a free loan.

A new meeting for Alexis Sanchez is scheduled for tomorrow between Inter and Manchester United. The sides are looking for a definitive agreement on the portion of wages that United will pay for Sanchez. The total wages owed is €15m net of taxes. Inter is proposing €3m, so Manchester United should pay the remaining €12m. The sides continue to work on a deal, but there is optimism.

What is the future of Mauro Icardi? The Argentine striker has not yet opened up to the possibility of going to Napoli. De Laurentiis' club continues to wait for the Inter player, and in the meantime they have not closed for Fernando Llorente. They are expected to contact the Spanish stiker's representatives after the game on Saturday against Fiorentina. If Icardi does not give an opening, the plan is to sign Llorente who has given his availability for a transfer to the Partenopei.

The deal could be closed in the coming hours: Fiorentina and Inter are still working on the Biraghi Dalbert swap and have had positiv contacts, as Dalbert wants to move to the Viola. The Brazilian fullback would have, initally, prefered a return to France as Nice was interested (so were other clubs). But since Inter had trouble finding an agreement with Nice, the Italian side moved to the Biraghi front. The outcome of the deal was tied to Dalbert's will to move to Fiorentina and he's now agreed to it. WHile his future is now set to take place in Serie A, at Florence, Biraghi is ready to wear the Nerazzurri's jersey.

New contacts between Inter and Manchester United for Alexis Sanchez. Some steps forward were made, but they are still looking for an agreement on the player's wages (12 million). Inter does not want to spend more than five million in wages for the ex-Udinese, and next week talks will happen again between the two clubs as they try to come to a final agreement.

致各位熱愛國米及意甲的球迷:

適逢香港正值多事之秋，眼見社會及政制問題被政府漠視，百萬人民之和平訴求未得到回應，以致社會紛爭動盪，有示威者以死相諫，甚至有無辜市民流血街頭，相信各位藍黑球迷在球季開鑼之初都未敢高歌慶祝勝利，反而我相信大家對我們熱愛的香港都有著難以筆墨的傷感。

常言足球跟政治不應混為一談，我等球迷亦非要在球迷會專頁歸邊或分化，在這個家裡，大家都是藍黑戰士，不少球迷更是支持愛隊數以十載，陪伴國米度過高低起跌，走過低谷，也分享過五冠偉業之光榮！但作為有良知的國米球迷，定必對不公義惡行有著打從心底的厭惡及不忿，因為這是人性對事非黑白的良知見解，為一個人的道德判斷！
一直以來，我們與黑哨 勢不兩立
我們與種族歧視 恥與為伍

quote.msg:
致各位熱愛國米及意甲的球迷:

適逢香港正值多事之秋，眼見社會及政制問題被政府漠視，百萬人民之和平訴求未得到回應，以致社會紛爭動盪，有示威者以死相諫，甚至有無辜市民流血街頭，相信各位藍黑球迷在球季開鑼之初都未敢高歌慶祝勝利，反而我相信大家對我們熱愛的香港都有著難以筆墨的傷感。

常言足球跟政治不應混為一談，我等球迷亦非要在球迷會專頁歸邊或分化，在這個家裡，大家都是藍黑戰士，不少球迷更是支持愛隊數以十載，陪伴國米度過高低起跌，走過低谷，也分享過五冠偉業之光榮！但作為有良知的國米球迷，定必對不公義惡行有著打從心底的厭惡及不忿，因為這是人性對事非黑白的良知見解，為一個人的道德判斷！
一直以來，我們與黑哨 勢不兩立
我們與種族歧視 恥與為伍
今天，我們對無差別攻擊市民的惡行 更不會姑息！
在香港，也許黃藍是政見，
在米蘭，紅藍是兩幫，
但在人性深處，黑白永遠是良知的分辨！
因為，我們強烈譴責721, 811, 831香港警察對香港市民的失職及無差別攻擊！
希望所有國米球迷 毋忘人性初心
在此亦鄭重呼籲所有泯滅人性之黑警會員退出本群組，以確保國米球迷不受無差別攻擊。

願香港 願國際米蘭 都有更美好的明天！
Forza Inter! Forza Hong Kong!

但佢老婆真係好on9，搞到咁嘅結局。
